message:
deps: upgrade beads dependency from v0.57.0 to v0.59.0

v0.58.0 is considered unstable. v0.59.0 fixes:
- --json flag ignored when --tree defaults to true (broke polecat JSON parsing)
- bd done as alias for bd close
- bd done <id> <message> treats last arg as reason
- Doctor --fix repairs broken hook markers
- Dolt CLI uses database subdirectory for push/pull

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
